name: Demo Project Detail (public)
description: Public demo project detail page (/demo/[id]). Smoke-parity for demo.spec.ts:193 (loads without an Internal Server Error for a valid-looking but non-existent UUID). This is a PUBLIC, unauthenticated route, so metadata.requiresUnauthenticated routes it through the harness's unauth lane (runUnauthSpec). The harness targets the dynamic [id] segment via a routeForSpec override that maps the `demo-detail` spec id to /demo/<fixed fake UUID> (the same fake-UUID shape the smoke test uses). For a non-existent project the public API returns 404, and the page renders its RESOLVED Not-Found view — we assert THAT (never the transient 'Loading project...' flash, which is timing-fragile; the harness gives this spec metadata.extraSettleMs so react-query's retry/backoff settles to the error render before the matcher snapshots). Read-only; structural only. Two coherent states.

states.name: Not-found header
states.description: The resolved not-found view's heading and explanatory message for a non-existent public project. Confirms the page rendered its error state (no Internal Server Error, no perpetual loading).

assertions.description: h1 'Project Not Found' heading anchors the resolved not-found view.

states.name: Back-to-demo navigation
states.description: The 'Back to Demo Projects' control on the not-found view: a Next <Link> (role=link) wrapping a Button (role=button). Both are registered; asserting each by its stable auto-assigned id anchors the recovery affordance.

assertions.description: 'Back to Demo Projects' link (the Next <Link> anchor).
'Back to Demo Projects' button nested inside the link.
